template_notice: FAIL-CLOSED: one factual record per Grok-native scene JPG. Never invent provider data or provenance.
project_hash_semantics: SHA-256 of sorted compact UTF-8 JSON with integral floats and negative zero normalized

source_record_schema.prompt: exact scene.visual.image_prompt submitted byte-for-byte to Grok

settings.seed: actual integer or null when unavailable

source_record_schema.job_id: actual provider job ID or documented durable local request ID
source_record_schema.output_path: exact images/scene_XX.jpg direct Grok output path
source_record_schema.output_sha256: actual lowercase SHA-256 of the direct JPG bytes

attempt_history.prompt: exact natural full-page prompt for this attempt

references.sha256: actual SHA-256 of those exact bytes

attempt_history.job_id: actual provider job ID or durable local request ID
attempt_history.output_path: required for GENERATED/APPROVED; rejected may omit only with factual error
attempt_history.output_sha256: required for GENERATED/APPROVED; rejected may omit only with factual error
attempt_history.error: required factual provider error only when REJECTED has no output
